title: 1 step DFU - Language update  when only EB has update
scenario: 1-step DFU where only Earbuds have a firmware update, verify language change completes successfully and Charge Case language is properly updated.
steps: Start the app with Osprey when only the Earbuds (EB) have a firmware update (Charge Case is already on the latest version).
Tap 'Update Now' and verify the Software Update screen is displayed.
Verify both the language change and DFU finish successfully.
Confirm the Earbuds are updated to the latest firmware.
Check the language on the Charge Case by navigating menus on the touch screen.
Verify the language is properly changed for the Charge Case.
expected: Language change and DFU complete successfully. Earbuds are updated to the latest firmware. The Charge Case language is properly changed as selected.
